overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 driving through the Badlands desert during a heavy rainstorm, transitioning between paved highways and off-road dirt terrain. The dashboard view shows a consistent speed of 69 km/h while navigating through stormy conditions with reduced visibility.

events.description: passes red octagonal stop sign on the right side of the road
steers vehicle off the paved highway onto dirt shoulder

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on rain-slicked desert highway, maintaining center lane position

entered.detail: rain-slicked paved road with visible tire tracks and puddles
silver metal highway guardrail running parallel to the road
red octagonal stop sign mounted on pole beside the road
large advertising billboard visible in the distance through the rain
scattered desert yucca trees dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with first-person vehicle gameplay driving along a rain-soaked desert highway. The asphalt glistens with water as heavy rain reduces visibility. The vehicle passes a stop sign and continues along the guarded roadway before steering onto the dirt shoulder at the segment's end.

events.description: leaves paved highway entirely, entering unpaved desert terrain
navigates past red and white striped concrete barrier blocks

agents.ego_description: off-roading through desert scrubland, navigating around natural obstacles and barriers

entered.detail: unpaved desert ground with patches of grass and mud
red and white striped concrete barrier blocks beside the path

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from paved road to open desert terrain, kicking up mud and dirt as it off-roads through the scrubland. The camera bounces slightly as it navigates past red and white barrier blocks, with Joshua trees scattered across the landscape and power lines visible in the distant haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert dirt trails with transmission lines

events.description: terrain firms into defined dirt trail running parallel to power lines
slight steering correction following the curve of the dirt trail

agents.ego_description: driving along dirt trails, approaching distant paved road while following power line corridor

entered.detail: well-worn dirt path with tire tracks through the desert
large metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cables
dilapidated small building or shelter beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The vehicle follows a defined dirt trail that runs parallel to towering electrical transmission lines. The terrain is firmer here, with the path winding through clusters of Joshua trees. An abandoned structure appears on the left as the vehicle continues toward the distant paved road visible through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural paved highway with power infrastructure

events.description: wheels return to paved asphalt surface after off-road segment
navigates gentle right curve in the rural highway

agents.ego_description: cruising along paved rural highway, passing under power lines and approaching abandoned structures

entered.detail: return to paved road surface with visible lane markings
metal guardrail running along the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions back onto paved asphalt, continuing along a rural highway lined with metal guardrails. Massive power line towers dominate the landscape, their cables stretching across the stormy sky. The road curves gently through the desert as the vehicle passes abandoned structures and scattered Joshua trees in the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-drenched desert that transitions from a paved highway into rugged off-road terrain before returning to the asphalt. It begins on a glistening, water-soaked highway where heavy rain obscures the horizon, moving past a stop sign before steering off the guarded roadway onto the dirt shoulder. As the vehicle enters the open scrubland, the camera bounces through mud and dirt, navigating past red and white barrier blocks and scattered Joshua trees under a hazy sky. The scene then shifts to a firmer dirt trail running parallel to towering electrical transmission lines and an abandoned structure, before the path winds back toward the distant pavement. Finally, the vehicle merges back onto a rural highway lined with metal guardrails, curving through the storm as massive power line towers dominate the landscape.
